title: Limodorum eburneum
taxonomy: Limodorum eburneum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Limodorum eburneum is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Limodorum is classified within the tribe Limodorae. This classification places Limodorum eburneum as a unique member of the orchid family.
uses: Limodorum eburneum, also known as the ivory nodding orchid, has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
